summary: Initial test suite generation for B2B Defense Supplier Marketplace Dashboard UI. Tested all three role-based dashboards (Admin, Supplier, Buyer) including role switching, navigation, stat displays, CRUD actions with confirmation dialogs, toast notifications, and golden-path end-to-end journeys.
seed_data_creation: No seed data - all data is mock (no backend)
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a UI-only prototype with no backend. All data is mock via React useState. 4 spec files cover: core-flows (role switching, nav), admin-dashboard (22 tests: stats, supplier/product/category/buyer/ratings management, platform insights), supplier-buyer-dashboard (28 tests: both Supplier and Buyer dashboards), golden-path (4 end-to-end journeys). Numbers are locale-formatted with commas (e.g. 2,847). Use getByRole('heading') not getByText() for headings to avoid strict mode violations.
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. All 62 tests pass on first clean run.
